main.pic-text: The upcoming CPI report could provide much needed momentum to the pound amidst Brexit anxiety. Whether the surprise is negative or positive, it’s definitely going to shake up the market...
main.text: Right now, traders favoring CAD-pairs are laser-focused on the upcoming Canadian Trade Balance report, as they expect it to establish the new course for the Canadian dollar.
